projectDescription: A full-stack AI symptom triage assistant that combines NLP and machine learning to suggest probable conditions based on free-text symptom descriptions and optional patient context.
keyFeatures: Free-text symptom analysis in Portuguese clinical language using NLP preprocessing
Optional patient context (age, sex, pregnancy, comorbidities, medications) for context-aware predictions
Top-N differential condition suggestions with confidence scores
Explainability output showing why the top condition was suggested
Local history storage — no personal data stored server-side
Emergency condition detection with urgent-care warnings
TF-IDF + XGBoost ML pipeline with modular retraining support
React/TypeScript SaaS-style frontend with collapsible patient context panel
publicApiSurface: GET /predict/ — Query-param based symptom prediction endpoint
POST /predict/ — JSON body symptom prediction with structured PatientContext
PatientContext model (age, sex, pregnant, comorbidities, medications, recent_conditions, recent_surgeries, lifestyle_notes)
PredictionResult (input_text, normalized_text, top_predictions, warning, disclaimer, patient_context, top_diagnosis_explanation)
HealthIAPredictor.predict(text, top_n, patient_context) — core ML inference class
